description: GEOS XML self-verification hooks. Stop hook (verify_outputs.py) blocks end_turn when /workspace/inputs/ is missing XML files or contains malformed XML. PostToolUse hook (verify_xml_post_write.py) catches XML parse errors immediately after each Write|Edit|MultiEdit so the agent gets feedback within seconds instead of after end-of-turn. Mitigates the minimax/gemma-on-OpenRouter empty-completion + doubled-bracket failures (see docs/XN-010, run7/run9 postmortem).
